category.scope_note: LED luminaire and light source compliance comparison for Chinese manufacturers exporting to the Jordan market (JSMO).

title.en: China-to-Jordan LED Luminaire Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国 LED 灯具出口约旦：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國 LED 燈具出口約旦：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China LED luminaire documentation against Jordan requirements administered by JSMO (Jordan Standards and Metrology Organization) — JS standards adopting IEC/GSO lighting standards (JS/IEC 60598, 62560, 62471), energy-efficiency labelling, and TRC radio approval for smart luminaires — versus Chinese GB standards and CCC certification. Jordan grid is 230 V, 50 Hz.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国 LED 灯具文件与约旦要求差距对照，约旦要求由 JSMO（约旦标准与计量组织）管理——采用 IEC/GSO 照明标准的 JS 标准（JS/IEC 60598、62560、62471）、能效标签，以及智能灯具的 TRC 无线电核准——并与中国 GB 标准及 CCC 认证对比。约旦电网为 230 V、50 Hz。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國 LED 燈具文件與約旦要求差距對照，約旦要求由 JSMO（約旦標準與計量組織）管理——採用 IEC/GSO 照明標準的 JS 標準（JS/IEC 60598、62560、62471）、能效標籤，以及智能燈具的 TRC 無線電核准——並與中國 GB 標準及 CCC 認證對比。約旦電網為 230 V、50 Hz。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity-assessment determination, product safety determination, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and the in-country importer should verify current Jordanian technical regulations, JSMO conformity-certificate requirements, JS/GSO standard references, energy-efficiency labelling thresholds, and TRC radio-approval obligations with qualified professionals and the registered Jordanian importer before shipment to Aqaba or market placement.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定认定、产品安全认定、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商及在地进口商在出货至亚喀巴或投放市场前，应与合格专业人士及在约旦注册的进口商核验现行约旦技术法规、JSMO 合格证书要求、JS/GSO 标准引用、能效标签阈值及 TRC 无线电核准义务。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定認定、產品安全認定、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商及在地進口商在出貨至亞喀巴或投放市場前，應與合格專業人士及在約旦註冊的進口商核驗現行約旦技術法規、JSMO 合格證書要求、JS/GSO 標準引用、能效標籤閾值及 TRC 無線電核准義務。

answer_first.en: A Chinese LED luminaire manufacturer exporting to Jordan must meet JSMO (Jordan Standards and Metrology Organization) technical-regulation and conformity-certificate requirements for regulated lighting products, based on JS standards that adopt IEC/GSO lighting standards (JS/IEC 60598-1 for luminaire safety, JS/IEC 62560/62471 for self-ballasted lamps and photobiological safety); apply an energy-efficiency label under the Jordanian labelling scheme; obtain TRC (Telecommunications Regulatory Commission) approval for smart luminaires with wireless functions; verify the product to Jordan's 230 V, 50 Hz grid (50 Hz matches China, but nominal voltage differs from China's 220 V); and ship through a registered in-country Jordanian importer (port of entry typically Aqaba). Jordan has no EU-style horizontal RoHS, no horizontal SVHC supply-chain regime, and no EU-style ecodesign minimum-efficacy regulation — instead an energy-label scheme applies. Existing CCC certification and GB test reports are not directly accepted; conformity is verified against the Jordanian/JS references.
answer_first.zh: 出口约旦的中国 LED 灯具制造商须：满足 JSMO（约旦标准与计量组织）对受管制照明产品的技术法规及合格证书要求，依据采用 IEC/GSO 照明标准的 JS 标准（灯具安全 JS/IEC 60598-1、自镇流灯及光生物安全 JS/IEC 62560/62471）；依据约旦标签方案贴附能效标签；为带无线功能的智能灯具取得 TRC（电信监管委员会）核准；按约旦 230 V、50 Hz 电网核验产品（50 Hz 与中国相同，但标称电压与中国 220 V 不同）；并通过在约旦注册的在地进口商出货（入境口岸通常为亚喀巴）。约旦没有欧盟式横向 RoHS，没有横向 SVHC 供应链制度，也没有欧盟式生态设计最低能效法规——而是适用能效标签方案。现有 CCC 认证及 GB 检测报告不被直接接受；合格性须依约旦/JS 引用核验。
answer_first.zht: 出口約旦的中國 LED 燈具製造商須：滿足 JSMO（約旦標準與計量組織）對受管制照明產品的技術法規及合格證書要求，依據採用 IEC/GSO 照明標準的 JS 標準（燈具安全 JS/IEC 60598-1、自鎮流燈及光生物安全 JS/IEC 62560/62471）；依據約旦標籤方案貼附能效標籤；為帶無線功能的智能燈具取得 TRC（電信監管委員會）核准；按約旦 230 V、50 Hz 電網核驗產品（50 Hz 與中國相同，但標稱電壓與中國 220 V 不同）；並通過在約旦註冊的在地進口商出貨（入境口岸通常為亞喀巴）。約旦沒有歐盟式橫向 RoHS，沒有橫向 SVHC 供應鏈制度，也沒有歐盟式生態設計最低能效法規——而是適用能效標籤方案。現有 CCC 認證及 GB 檢測報告不被直接接受；合格性須依約旦/JS 引用核驗。

editorial_controls.review_cycle: Quarterly, or on any change to JSMO technical regulations, JS/GSO lighting standard references, the Jordanian energy-label scheme, or TRC radio-approval rules.
editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verification flag before human_reviewed can be true. JSMO conformity-certificate requirements, JS standard adoptions of IEC/GSO references, and the energy-label thresholds must be re-verified against current JSMO and GSO publications on each review cycle.
